name: dynatrace-connector
title: Dynatrace Connector
description: Monitor your Dynatrace environment directly from Raycast — search logs, track problems, inspect deployments and entities.
author: yaroslav_volenyuk

preferences.name: useMockData
preferences.title: Use Mock Data
preferences.description: Use fake local data instead of real Dynatrace API (for development)
preferences.label: Enable mock mode

commands.name: dt-search-logs
commands.title: Search Logs
commands.subtitle: Dynatrace
commands.description: Search Dynatrace Grail logs with DQL filters

commands.name: dt-entities
commands.title: Find Entity
commands.subtitle: Dynatrace
commands.description: Search services, hosts and process groups

commands.name: dt-saved-queries
commands.title: Saved DQL Queries
commands.subtitle: Dynatrace
commands.description: Manage and run saved DQL queries

commands.name: dt-tenants
commands.title: Manage Tenants
commands.subtitle: Dynatrace
commands.description: Add, edit and switch between Dynatrace tenants

commands.name: dt-menubar-problems
commands.title: Problems in Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: Dynatrace
commands.description: Show open problem count in macOS menu bar

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
